overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player character moves through an industrial urban area with elevated highways, concrete support pillars, and futuristic buildings under bright midday sun, transitioning from a covered roadway to open commercial streets and back under overpasses.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward beneath the elevated highway deck between large concrete support pillars

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead with yellow support beams
large cylindrical concrete pillar supporting the highway deck
metal pipe structure running parallel to the highway with red valve housings
concrete wall with green and red graffiti art
metal security fence running along the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking beneath a massive elevated highway structure in an industrial district. Large concrete pillars line the path, and a chain-link fence runs along the right side. The area is shaded by the overhead highway deck, with graffiti visible on the left wall and parked cars along the street.

events.description: exits the covered highway area into an open sunlit intersection
large black military truck drives across the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at an intersection, pausing for the military truck to pass

notable_agents.action: large black military transport truck driving across the intersection
person in white outfit crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
vertical traffic signal pole with multiple lights
tall contemporary building with reflective glass facade

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the shaded highway underpass to a bright open intersection. The player crosses the street at a marked crosswalk as a large military truck passes by. Modern glass buildings rise in the background while the elevated highway recedes into the left background.

events.description: enters commercial district with large digital billboards and advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial sidewalk passing pedestrians and large digital displays

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow top and shorts walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large digital advertisement display showing 'BIG' text with colorful graphics
vertical digital poster displays with cyberpunk-style advertisements
tall palm trees lining the street in the distance
large metal electrical transmission tower with multiple cables

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a commercial sidewalk dominated by large digital billboards on the right, including a prominent 'BIG' advertisement. Palm trees become visible in the distance, and a large power line tower rises near the center of the street. Pedestrians walk in both directions along the busy sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban street with utility structures

events.description: scene opens up with palm trees lining the street and utility buildings visible

agents.ego_description: continuing down the open street passing palm trees and utility structures

entered.detail: low industrial building with ventilation equipment and metal siding
concrete bridge structure ahead that the path leads under

segments.scene_description: The street opens up with palm trees now lining the left side of the walkway. The player approaches a concrete overpass ahead while passing a utility building on the right. The elevated highway structure that was in the background is now directly overhead again as the path leads under another bridge.

events.description: enters the shaded area beneath the concrete overpass

agents.ego_description: walking under the concrete overpass into a more enclosed urban space

entered.detail: modern street lamp with orange accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player entering a covered walkway beneath a concrete overpass. The lighting becomes more diffused and shadowed. The utility building is now close on the right, and the street opens up ahead under the bridge structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through an industrial urban district that transitions from a shaded underpass into a bright commercial corridor before returning to the shadows of a concrete overpass. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway, moving past large concrete pillars and graffiti-covered walls in the cool shade of the overhead deck. As the camera emerges from the underpass, the scene opens into a bright, sunlit intersection where a military truck passes by and modern glass buildings rise against the skyline. The path then shifts toward a busy commercial sidewalk lined with towering digital billboards and palm trees, passing pedestrians and a large power line tower. Finally, the environment narrows as the camera approaches a utility building and moves back under the heavy concrete structure of another bridge, where the lighting becomes diffused and shadowed once more.
